title: Working Construction: Why White Working-Class Men Put Themselves -- and the Labor Movement -- in Harm's Way By Kris Paap ILR Press, 2006. 272 pages. $52.50 (cloth), $19.95 (paper)
abstract: Journal Article Working Construction: Why White Working-Class Men Put Themselves — and the Labor Movement — in Harm's Way By Kris Paap ILR Press, 2006. 272 pages. $52.50 (cloth), $19.95 (paper) Get access Eve Shapiro Eve Shapiro University of San Francisco Search for other works by this author on: Oxford Academic Google Scholar Social Forces, Volume 86, Issue 2, December 2007, Pages 865–867, https://doi.org/10.1093/sf/86.2.865 Published: 01 December 2007
